body_txt: Different works have very different reasons why The Sleeper must remain asleep, but the ten major types of reasons are: If the Sleeper does wake up, a Dream Apocalypse might occur (even in the real world, if the sleeper in question is a Reality Warper ). Compare Getting the Baby to Sleep , a Comedy Trope about the difficulty of getting an infant asleep to begin with. Contrast Heavy Sleeper , who you cannot wake if you try. Compare Stealth-Based Mission , the video game equivalent.
